request.description:
### Create Project in CRM

This endpoint allows the CRM team to create a new project or update an existing project in the CRM system.

#### Request Body

- `painter_app_project_id` (integer): If null, new records will be created; otherwise, the CRM team must pass the ID to update the project.
    
- `first_name` (string, required, max length 50): First name of the customer.
    
- `last_name` (string, max length 50): Last name of the customer.
    
- `phone` (string, required, length 10): Phone number of the customer.
    
- `email` (string, max length 50): Email of the customer.
    
- `street` (string, max length 100): Street of the customer's address.
    
- `city` (string, max length 50): City of the customer's address.
    
- `state` (string, max length 50): State of the customer's address.
    
- `address_line_1` (string, required, max length 100): Address line 1 of the customer.
    
- `postal_code` (string, required, length 6): Postal code of the customer's address.
    
- `have_contractor` (string, values: Y, N, default: Y): Indicates if there is a contractor associated with the project.
    
- `contractor_name` (string, max length 50): Name of the contractor (optional).
    
- `contractor_mobile` (string, length 10): Mobile number of the contractor.
    
- `contractor_opusID` (string, length 10, required): Opus ID of the contractor for project association.
    
- `project_name` (string, max length 50): Name of the project (optional).
    
- `site_status` (string, required, values: T, U, C): Status of the site (To Commence, Underway, Completed).
    
- `no_of_rooms` (integer): Number of rooms in the project (optional).
    
- `lead_type` (string, required, values: I, E, IE): Type of lead (Interior, Exterior, Interior & Exterior).
    
- `requirement` (array of strings): Array of project requirements (e.g., Texture, Water Proofing, Wood Finish, Special Effects).
    
- `crmsiteid` (string): CRM site ID if the record exists in the CRM system (optional).
    

#### Response

The response is in JSON format with the following schema:

``` json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "success": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "message": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "error": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "painterappproject_id": {
      "type": "integer"
    }
  }
}

 ```

The response includes:

- `success` (boolean): Indicates if the request was successful.
    
- `message` (string): Additional information or error message.
    
- `error` (boolean): Indicates if an error occurred.
    
- `painterappproject_id` (integer): ID of the project in the painter app.
    

Example Response:

``` json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "",
  "error": true,
  "painterappproject_id": 0
}

 ```

request.description:
### Create Project in CRM

This endpoint allows the CRM team to create a new project or update an existing project in the CRM system.

#### Request Body

- `painter_app_project_id` (integer): If null, new records will be created; otherwise, the CRM team must pass the ID to update the project.
    
- `first_name` (string, required, max length 50): First name of the customer.
    
- `last_name` (string, max length 50): Last name of the customer.
    
- `phone` (string, required, length 10): Phone number of the customer.
    
- `email` (string, max length 50): Email of the customer.
    
- `street` (string, max length 100): Street of the customer's address.
    
- `city` (string, max length 50): City of the customer's address.
    
- `state` (string, max length 50): State of the customer's address.
    
- `address_line_1` (string, required, max length 100): Address line 1 of the customer.
    
- `postal_code` (string, required, length 6): Postal code of the customer's address.
    
- `have_contractor` (string, values: Y, N, default: Y): Indicates if there is a contractor associated with the project.
    
- `contractor_name` (string, max length 50): Name of the contractor (optional).
    
- `contractor_mobile` (string, length 10): Mobile number of the contractor.
    
- `contractor_opusID` (string, length 10, required): Opus ID of the contractor for project association.
    
- `project_name` (string, max length 50): Name of the project (optional).
    
- `site_status` (string, required, values: T, U, C): Status of the site (To Commence, Underway, Completed).
    
- `no_of_rooms` (integer): Number of rooms in the project (optional).
    
- `lead_type` (string, required, values: I, E, IE): Type of lead (Interior, Exterior, Interior & Exterior).
    
- `requirement` (array of strings): Array of project requirements (e.g., Texture, Water Proofing, Wood Finish, Special Effects).
    
- `crmsiteid` (string): CRM site ID if the record exists in the CRM system (optional).
    

#### Response

The response is in JSON format with the following schema:

``` json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "success": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "message": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "error": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "painterappproject_id": {
      "type": "integer"
    }
  }
}

 ```

The response includes:

- `success` (boolean): Indicates if the request was successful.
    
- `message` (string): Additional information or error message.
    
- `error` (boolean): Indicates if an error occurred.
    
- `painterappproject_id` (integer): ID of the project in the painter app.
    

Example Response:

``` json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "",
  "error": true,
  "painterappproject_id": 0
}

 ```

request.description:
### Create Project in CRM

This endpoint allows the CRM team to create a new project or update an existing project in the CRM system.

#### Request Body

- `painter_app_project_id` (integer): If null, new records will be created; otherwise, the CRM team must pass the ID to update the project.
    
- `first_name` (string, required, max length 50): First name of the customer.
    
- `last_name` (string, max length 50): Last name of the customer.
    
- `phone` (string, required, length 10): Phone number of the customer.
    
- `email` (string, max length 50): Email of the customer.
    
- `street` (string, max length 100): Street of the customer's address.
    
- `city` (string, max length 50): City of the customer's address.
    
- `state` (string, max length 50): State of the customer's address.
    
- `address_line_1` (string, required, max length 100): Address line 1 of the customer.
    
- `postal_code` (string, required, length 6): Postal code of the customer's address.
    
- `have_contractor` (string, values: Y, N, default: Y): Indicates if there is a contractor associated with the project.
    
- `contractor_name` (string, max length 50): Name of the contractor (optional).
    
- `contractor_mobile` (string, length 10): Mobile number of the contractor.
    
- `contractor_opusID` (string, length 10, required): Opus ID of the contractor for project association.
    
- `project_name` (string, max length 50): Name of the project (optional).
    
- `site_status` (string, required, values: T, U, C): Status of the site (To Commence, Underway, Completed).
    
- `no_of_rooms` (integer): Number of rooms in the project (optional).
    
- `lead_type` (string, required, values: I, E, IE): Type of lead (Interior, Exterior, Interior & Exterior).
    
- `requirement` (array of strings): Array of project requirements (e.g., Texture, Water Proofing, Wood Finish, Special Effects).
    
- `crmsiteid` (string): CRM site ID if the record exists in the CRM system (optional).
    

#### Response

The response is in JSON format with the following schema:

``` json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "success": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "message": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "error": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "painterappproject_id": {
      "type": "integer"
    }
  }
}

 ```

The response includes:

- `success` (boolean): Indicates if the request was successful.
    
- `message` (string): Additional information or error message.
    
- `error` (boolean): Indicates if an error occurred.
    
- `painterappproject_id` (integer): ID of the project in the painter app.
    

Example Response:

``` json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "",
  "error": true,
  "painterappproject_id": 0
}

 ```

request.description:
### Create Project in CRM

This endpoint allows the CRM team to create a new project or update an existing project in the CRM system.

#### Request Body

- `painter_app_project_id` (integer): If null, new records will be created; otherwise, the CRM team must pass the ID to update the project.
    
- `first_name` (string, required, max length 50): First name of the customer.
    
- `last_name` (string, max length 50): Last name of the customer.
    
- `phone` (string, required, length 10): Phone number of the customer.
    
- `email` (string, max length 50): Email of the customer.
    
- `street` (string, max length 100): Street of the customer's address.
    
- `city` (string, max length 50): City of the customer's address.
    
- `state` (string, max length 50): State of the customer's address.
    
- `address_line_1` (string, required, max length 100): Address line 1 of the customer.
    
- `postal_code` (string, required, length 6): Postal code of the customer's address.
    
- `have_contractor` (string, values: Y, N, default: Y): Indicates if there is a contractor associated with the project.
    
- `contractor_name` (string, max length 50): Name of the contractor (optional).
    
- `contractor_mobile` (string, length 10): Mobile number of the contractor.
    
- `contractor_opusID` (string, length 10, required): Opus ID of the contractor for project association.
    
- `project_name` (string, max length 50): Name of the project (optional).
    
- `site_status` (string, required, values: T, U, C): Status of the site (To Commence, Underway, Completed).
    
- `no_of_rooms` (integer): Number of rooms in the project (optional).
    
- `lead_type` (string, required, values: I, E, IE): Type of lead (Interior, Exterior, Interior & Exterior).
    
- `requirement` (array of strings): Array of project requirements (e.g., Texture, Water Proofing, Wood Finish, Special Effects).
    
- `crmsiteid` (string): CRM site ID if the record exists in the CRM system (optional).
    

#### Response

The response is in JSON format with the following schema:

``` json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "success": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "message": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "error": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "painterappproject_id": {
      "type": "integer"
    }
  }
}

 ```

The response includes:

- `success` (boolean): Indicates if the request was successful.
    
- `message` (string): Additional information or error message.
    
- `error` (boolean): Indicates if an error occurred.
    
- `painterappproject_id` (integer): ID of the project in the painter app.
    

Example Response:

``` json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "",
  "error": true,
  "painterappproject_id": 0
}

 ```

request.description:
### Create Project in CRM

This endpoint allows the CRM team to create a new project or update an existing project in the CRM system.

#### Request Body

- `painter_app_project_id` (integer): If null, new records will be created; otherwise, the CRM team must pass the ID to update the project.
    
- `first_name` (string, required, max length 50): First name of the customer.
    
- `last_name` (string, max length 50): Last name of the customer.
    
- `phone` (string, required, length 10): Phone number of the customer.
    
- `email` (string, max length 50): Email of the customer.
    
- `street` (string, max length 100): Street of the customer's address.
    
- `city` (string, max length 50): City of the customer's address.
    
- `state` (string, max length 50): State of the customer's address.
    
- `address_line_1` (string, required, max length 100): Address line 1 of the customer.
    
- `postal_code` (string, required, length 6): Postal code of the customer's address.
    
- `have_contractor` (string, values: Y, N, default: Y): Indicates if there is a contractor associated with the project.
    
- `contractor_name` (string, max length 50): Name of the contractor (optional).
    
- `contractor_mobile` (string, length 10): Mobile number of the contractor.
    
- `contractor_opusID` (string, length 10, required): Opus ID of the contractor for project association.
    
- `project_name` (string, max length 50): Name of the project (optional).
    
- `site_status` (string, required, values: T, U, C): Status of the site (To Commence, Underway, Completed).
    
- `no_of_rooms` (integer): Number of rooms in the project (optional).
    
- `lead_type` (string, required, values: I, E, IE): Type of lead (Interior, Exterior, Interior & Exterior).
    
- `requirement` (array of strings): Array of project requirements (e.g., Texture, Water Proofing, Wood Finish, Special Effects).
    
- `crmsiteid` (string): CRM site ID if the record exists in the CRM system (optional).
    

#### Response

The response is in JSON format with the following schema:

``` json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "success": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "message": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "error": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "painterappproject_id": {
      "type": "integer"
    }
  }
}

 ```

The response includes:

- `success` (boolean): Indicates if the request was successful.
    
- `message` (string): Additional information or error message.
    
- `error` (boolean): Indicates if an error occurred.
    
- `painterappproject_id` (integer): ID of the project in the painter app.
    

Example Response:

``` json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "",
  "error": true,
  "painterappproject_id": 0
}

 ```

request.description:
### Create Project in CRM

This endpoint allows the CRM team to create a new project or update an existing project in the CRM system.

#### Request Body

- `painter_app_project_id` (integer): If null, new records will be created; otherwise, the CRM team must pass the ID to update the project.
    
- `first_name` (string, required, max length 50): First name of the customer.
    
- `last_name` (string, max length 50): Last name of the customer.
    
- `phone` (string, required, length 10): Phone number of the customer.
    
- `email` (string, max length 50): Email of the customer.
    
- `street` (string, max length 100): Street of the customer's address.
    
- `city` (string, max length 50): City of the customer's address.
    
- `state` (string, max length 50): State of the customer's address.
    
- `address_line_1` (string, required, max length 100): Address line 1 of the customer.
    
- `postal_code` (string, required, length 6): Postal code of the customer's address.
    
- `have_contractor` (string, values: Y, N, default: Y): Indicates if there is a contractor associated with the project.
    
- `contractor_name` (string, max length 50): Name of the contractor (optional).
    
- `contractor_mobile` (string, length 10): Mobile number of the contractor.
    
- `contractor_opusID` (string, length 10, required): Opus ID of the contractor for project association.
    
- `project_name` (string, max length 50): Name of the project (optional).
    
- `site_status` (string, required, values: T, U, C): Status of the site (To Commence, Underway, Completed).
    
- `no_of_rooms` (integer): Number of rooms in the project (optional).
    
- `lead_type` (string, required, values: I, E, IE): Type of lead (Interior, Exterior, Interior & Exterior).
    
- `requirement` (array of strings): Array of project requirements (e.g., Texture, Water Proofing, Wood Finish, Special Effects).
    
- `crmsiteid` (string): CRM site ID if the record exists in the CRM system (optional).
    

#### Response

The response is in JSON format with the following schema:

``` json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "success": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "message": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "error": {
      "type": "boolean"
    },
    "painterappproject_id": {
      "type": "integer"
    }
  }
}

 ```

The response includes:

- `success` (boolean): Indicates if the request was successful.
    
- `message` (string): Additional information or error message.
    
- `error` (boolean): Indicates if an error occurred.
    
- `painterappproject_id` (integer): ID of the project in the painter app.
    

Example Response:

``` json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "",
  "error": true,
  "painterappproject_id": 0
}

 ```
